_comment: Terminal capture config for PR evidence. Run: python3 capture_terminal.py --all

captures.before: python3 -c "from gittensor.validator import MirrorPRAdapter; m=MirrorPRAdapter(); print(type(m).__name__)"
captures.after: python3 -c "from gittensor.validator import MirrorPRAdapter; m=MirrorPRAdapter(); print(type(m).__name__)"
captures.label: Mirror PR adapter null numeric fix

captures.before:
python3 -c "
import os
f='test.txt'
open(f,'w').close()
# Simulate extensionless check
ext = os.path.splitext(f)[1]
print(f'Extension of {f}: {repr(ext)}')
os.remove(f)
"
captures.after:
python3 -c "
import os
# After fix: extensionless files scored by line count
f='no_ext'
open(f,'w').write('line1\nline2\nline3\n')
ext = os.path.splitext(f)[1]
print(f'Extension of {f}: {repr(ext)}')
print('Fix: score by line-count when ext is empty')
os.remove(f)
"
captures.label: extensionless files fix
